current_phase.current_task: None — phase complete. See next_steps for options.

completed.milestone: Phase 1 design complete — CharacterProfile, ArcStage, ValidationResult models designed
Phase 1 implementation — core domain models, YAML loading, 29 tests
Phase 2 — LLM adapters (ClaudeAdapter, OllamaAdapter, LLMFactory), 55 tests

completed.description: Deterministic pre-layer (forbidden vocab, arc stage, signature phrases) + orchestrator that primes the LLM with deterministic findings via pre_context. 114 tests passing.

llm_adapters.notes: pre_context parameter added to validate_voice() this session to support deterministic injection

capabilities: Forbidden vocab: whole-word, case-insensitive regex match
Arc stage lookup: by chapter number or in-story date
Signature phrase detection: case-insensitive substring match
to_context_injection(): formats findings for LLM prompt

validation_service.flow: DeterministicValidator -> pre_context injection -> LLM -> merge flags -> recompute is_valid

demo_script.notes: Unicode-safe (UTF-8 wrapper). --no-llm works without API key.

cli_interface.notes: Future phase. Would accept .md file paths and run per-paragraph validation.

reflect_integration.notes: Phase 5. Auto-learning from writer corrections. Deferred until CLI is ready.

no_api_key_needed.what_it_shows: Deterministic layer: forbidden vocab flags, arc stage, signature phrases

not_yet_testable: Validation of actual .md chapter files (no file-based CLI yet)

pre_context_vs_context.rationale: Keeps concerns separate. LLM prompt has a dedicated 'Pre-Computed Rule Violations' section with 'Do not re-flag' instruction. Tested in ValidationService tests.

deduplication_rule.decision: When both deterministic and LLM flag same word, keep LLM entry (richer suggestion)
deduplication_rule.rationale: LLM provides better context/suggestions. Deterministic entry is dropped.

forbidden_patterns_deferred.decision: Readability scoring and POS tagging explicitly excluded from MVP
forbidden_patterns_deferred.rationale: Needs incremental testing to prove effectiveness. Too risky to add before validation.

tmpclaude_dirs.risk: None — these are empty or contain only temp outputs

next_steps.action: Run demo against actual Water Rising excerpts
next_steps.why: First real-world test of the full pipeline. Will reveal if arc stage detection, forbidden vocab, and LLM layer are calibrated correctly.

next_steps.description: Accept a .md file + character name, run ValidationService per paragraph or scene. Unlocks actual use as a writing tool.

All adapters exist, but Ollama path has not been exercised in the demo.

on_session_start: Read this file (project-state.json) to understand current state
Read SESSION-2026-03-03.md for detailed context on the last session
114 tests pass — run .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/ -q to verify before making changes
architecture_notes: Hexagonal: ports/ defines abstract interfaces, adapters/ has implementations
ValidationService is the main entry point for callers — takes profile + excerpt, returns ValidationResult
DeterministicValidator is always called first, its output goes into pre_context= (NOT context=)
pre_context is injected under '## Pre-Computed Rule Violations' in the LLM prompt
